description: This pipeline processes folders by listing their subfolders, creating annotations for each path based on its name or full path, and then filtering these paths according to specific criteria, resulting in a filtered set of annotated paths.

6af06756-70fd-4ed8-a03f-26aacc9a03f1.name: path-filter
6af06756-70fd-4ed8-a03f-26aacc9a03f1.description: Filters the paths (files/folders) by their name or absolute path

437b6dd8-3185-4886-8d54-1d58d3824f7e.name: path-to-annotation-simple
437b6dd8-3185-4886-8d54-1d58d3824f7e.description: Creates an annotation for each path based on its name or its full path.
